title: sphaerostephanos multiauriculatus
intro: Sphaerostephanos multiauriculatus, a species of fern, is a type of vascular plant belonging to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits associated with Sphaerostephanos multiauriculatus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea or using it in traditional remedies to harness its medicinal properties.
